title: eleocharis acicularis subsp. yokoscensis
intro: Eleocharis acicularis subsp. yokoscensis, also known as Japanese needle spikerush, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Eleocharis acicularis subsp. yokoscensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared by drying and infusing its rhizomes and roots, often in the form of tea or tincture, to harness its medicinal properties.
